## [03:01 - 06:04]

and it allows people to learn from you. When you start feeling yourself creating series, maybe you're starting to really fall in love with your video content. ## [09:07 - 12:10]

even when you see changes because what will happen in your consistency is that you could have a really great month where you're seeing an influx of engagement and then something changes in one of your social media platforms.
